headline: Here is why Devon Energy (DVN) is Among the Best Cheap Large Cap Stocks to Buy Now
summary: Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) is one of the 8 Cheap Large Cap Stocks to Buy Now. On April 7, 2026, BMO Capital raised the price target on Devon Energy Corporation (NYSE:DVN) to $60 from $55 and maintained an Outperform rating as part of a broader update incorporating Q1 mark-to-market assumptions tied to the Iran war […]

headline: Top Wall Street analysts prefer these dividend stocks for steady income
summary: Given ongoing uncertainty, investors may seek to add some stability to their portfolios by buying dividend stocks for steady income.
